items.title: ‘We’re up against forces that have all the money in the world’: Erin Brockovich on her battle against AI datacentres
items.summary: In 1993, she squeezed a $333m settlement from a Californian energy company in a scandal over contaminated water. Three decades later, she has a new target in her sights – and it’s globalWhen Erin Brockovich woke to find 30 emails from people from the same town, she realised something was going on.

items.title: Screen time can damage under-twos’ development, landmark study suggests

items.title: Noah Kahan Asks Concertgoers Not To Shit In Their Seats
items.summary: Yesterday Noah Kahan asked his fans to stop stealing his hometown's road sign, and now he's asking them to not shit their seats at his shows. Whereas Olivia Rodrigo recently made headlines after discussing concertgoers wearing adult diapers at her concerts in general admission, it seems Kahan's fans are somehow even worse. The post Noah Kahan Asks Concertgoers Not To Shit In Their Seats appeared first on Stereogum.
